title: Pack of 8 Premium White Gold Holly Berry Christmas Crackers - 12.5" Metallic Festive Xmas Holiday Dinner Table Decorations - Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: Enhance your festive table with this set of 8 premium crackers from Harvey & Mason, featuring alternating gold and white designs with intricate foliage patterns and red berry detailing.
Each cracker measures approximately 12.5 inches and is finished with shimmering gold curling ribbon, offering a blend of traditional elegance and premium presentation.
Inside each cracker, guests will find a colourful paper hat, a festive motto, a snap for that classic pop, and a carefully selected reusable gift—completely plastic-free.
The set includes 8 matching place cards, allowing you to personalise each seat at your Christmas dinner, adding a thoughtful and organised touch to your holiday gathering.
Designed with sustainability in mind, both the crackers and packaging are fully recyclable, making this stylish and functional set an eco-conscious choice for the festive season.
description: Product Description Premium Christmas Crackers Celebrate in style with Harvey & Mason Premium Christmas Crackers, expertly crafted to bring elegance, sparkle, and festive fun to your table. Each set offers a luxurious design, classic tradition, and joyful surprises for family and friends to enjoy this holiday season. Beautifully designed with classic holly and robin motifs, each cracker brings tradition, fun, and a joyful surprise to your holiday table. Featuring a traditional tree design, each cracker adds sparkle, joy, and a classic touch of holiday cheer, complete with fun surprises inside for family and friends. Showcasing a timeless holly design in elegant gold and white, each cracker delivers sparkle, tradition, and joyful surprises for a memorable holiday celebration. Decorated with delicate festive florals, each cracker brings style, sparkle, and joyful surprises to your holiday table, perfect for celebrating with family and friends. Featuring a festive design in bold red and white, each cracker adds cheer, tradition, and fun surprises to your holiday table, making every gathering extra special. Tree Scene 12.5" Crackers Bring festive magic to your table with these Tree Scene Christmas Crackers. Featuring a charming woodland tree design, each cracker combines tradition, sparkle, and joyful surprises to make your holiday celebrations truly memorable.
